name: No security contact email configured in Defender for Cloud
description: No security contact with email notifications is configured in Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Without a security contact, critical security alerts — including active attacks and compromised resources — are not communicated to responsible personnel.
remediation: Configure a security contact: Defender for Cloud → Environment Settings → Subscription → Email notifications → Add email address and enable 'Notify about alerts with the following severity: High'. Add a distribution list, not an individual, to ensure continuity.
